title: Fig. 1 121 Mathematics
subject: Mathematics
objective: To obtain the perpendicular bisector of a line segment by paper folding
procedure:
1.   Take a sheet of thick paper. Fold it in any way. Get a crease by unfolding
it. This crease will give a line as shown in Fig.1.
Fig. 1
2.   Mark points A and B on this line to get a line segment AB as shown
in Fig.2.
3.   Fold the paper such that A falls on B. Unfold it and get a crease mark
CD on the crease as shown in Fig.3.
observation:
In Fig. 3, the number of unit squares in first row = ________.
The number of unit squares in second row = _________.
The number of unit squares in third row = _________.
The number of unit squares in fourth row = _________.
Total number of unit squares =_______ = _______   ×   _______.
Area of the rectangle = _______   ×   _______.
discussion:
This activity can be used to explain meaning of area of a rectangle and also
to obtain area of a square.
122 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
